{{Quote|Zaloriis formally declares its independence!|Transe Decar to Darth Vader|audio=ZaloriisIndependence-SWGB.flac|<ref name="GB" />}}
The '''Zaloriis Separatists''' were an organization of [[Human/Legends|humans]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Zaloriis/Legends|Zaloriis]] who wanted to secede from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a conflict which it fought the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the separatists secretly allied themselves with the Alliance and captured most of the Imperial forces on Zaloriis. The planet was later visited by the second-in-command of the Empire, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], who was searching for the Alliance and had come to Zaloriis to meet with [[Transe Decar]], one of Zaloriis's [[Zalor Minister|Ministers]] and a separatist leader. With several [[Zalor Militiaman|soldiers]], Decar ambushed Vader and announced that Zaloriis had seceded, but was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by him. Vader then questioned one of the [[Unidentified Zalor militiaman|soldiers]] where the Imperial forces were, and then killed all of them. The Empire then freed their captured [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and [[Zaloriis campaign/Legends|destroyed]] the Separatist headquarters at the planet's capital, [[Zaloriis City]], ending their secession.<ref name="GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Zaloriis Separatists were first mentioned in the [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]] for the [[2001]] [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'',<ref name="GB guide">[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref> and later appeared in the game and its [[2002]] [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|expansion]]. The separatists must be defeated by the player using the Empire in the level, "An Empire's Fury".<ref name="GB" />
